content.text: All checks pass. Now let me commit and push.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(classic-laddie): lock screen immediately after auto-login

Auto-login is enabled via services.displayManager.autoLogin, but the
screen was not locked on session start, leaving a window where physical
access grants full desktop access before hypridle kicks in.

Add hyprlock to exec-once so a password prompt appears immediately
after SDDM auto-logs in, matching the pattern used in home/remoting.nix
for johnny-walker.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "fix(classic-laddie): lock screen immediately after auto-login" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Auto-login is enabled on classic-laddie but the screen was not locked on session start, leaving a window where physical access grants full desktop access before hypridle kicks in
- Add `hyprlock` to Hyprland's `exec-once` so a password prompt appears immediately after SDDM auto-logs in, matching the pattern used in `home/remoting.nix` for johnny-walker

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify `nix flake check` passes (confirmed locally)
- [ ] Verify `nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel` evaluates without errors (confirmed locally)
- [ ] Deploy to classic-laddie and confirm hyprlock appears immediately after auto-login

Run: 20260317-0726-89e0
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/352

Added `hyprlock` to `exec-once` in classic-laddie's home-manager config in `flake.nix`, so the screen locks immediately after SDDM auto-login. Both `nix flake check` and config evaluation passed successfully.
